programme.desc: Claire is determined to make up for her less-than-joyful mood at Jay and Gloria's wedding by throwing their 10th anniversary party. As part of the festivities, Phil is going to perform a magic trick featuring Gloria.

programme.title: Modern Family: Winner Winner Turkey Dinner
programme.desc: During Jay's Thanksgiving toast, he honours the entire family on their recent successes, even though everyone knows that isn't quite true.

programme.title: Modern Family: Brushes With Celebrity
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tucker clan recount all their biggest celebrity encounters. Phil shows a house to his musical hero and is determined to make a good impression despite the intense pain radiating from a very inconvenient part of his body.

programme.title: Modern Family: Tough Love
programme.desc: After leaving his real estate firm to strike out on his own, Phil decides a solo camping trip in the wild will be just what he needs to boost his confidence. Meanwhile, Mitchell plans to teach Cam and Lily a lesson.

programme.title: Modern Family: No Small Feet
programme.desc: When Claire lands a big opportunity for Pritchett's Closets, Jay expects a little validation for his contribution, and Pam's ex-boyfriend Bo shows up and Mitchell sees this as the perfect opportunity to get Pam out of the house.

programme.title: Modern Family: He Said, She Shed
programme.desc: Claire's request to build a 'She Shed' in their backyard is denied by the homeowner's association and only Luke and Phil know the real reason why.

programme.title: Modern Family: Dear Beloved Family
programme.desc: Gloria has to rush Phil to the hospital for an emergency surgery after he experiences some intense stomach pains and rallies the entire family to be by his side.

programme.title: Modern Family: In Your Head
programme.desc: When Luke goes missing after a night out in a sketchy neighbourhood, Manny, Phil and Gloria team up to track him down.

programme.title: Modern Family: Written in the Stars
programme.desc: Phil thinks that Gloria is upset at Jay for dropping the ball on Valentine's Day, so he convinces Jay to spice things up with a little role playing that doesn't go off as planned.

programme.title: Modern Family: Wine Weekend
programme.desc: The family goes on a wine tasting trip and stays in Haley's new boss' country house where the only rule is: Don't touch the tiara! Meanwhile, Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house but can't bring anyone else.

programme.title: Modern Family: Daddy Issues
programme.desc: When Gloria’s ex-boyfriend Jorge stops by for a visit, his striking resemblance to Manny makes Jay question if he might be Manny's real dad; Phil agonizes over getting the perfect anniversary gift for Claire.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Perfect Equation

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks

programme.title: Movie: Alvin and the Chipmunks: The Squeakquel
programme.desc: Alvin, Simon and Theodore are under their cousin Toby's care. Upon returning to school, they are tasked with winning a music competition whose cash prize will save the school's music department. They find competition in the form of the Chipettes.

programme.title: Movie: Holes
programme.desc: A wrongly convicted young man is sent to a detention camp where he must dig mysterious holes in search of a treasure.

programme.title: Bones: The Cinderella in Cardboard
programme.desc: When the image of the Virgin Mary is spotted on a bale of compressed cardboard at a recycling plant, Booth and Brennan are on the scene. Upon closer inspection, they find a flattened body inside the compressed cardboard.

programme.title: Bones: Mayhem on a Cross
programme.desc: When a real human skeleton is found being used as a stage prop for a death metal band in Norway, authorities determine the victim was an American citizen. Booth and Brennan venture into the unfamiliar world of death metal music to find a killer.

programme.title: Bones: The Double Death of the Dearly Departed
programme.desc: When a Jeffersonian coworker from the Egyptology department dies of heart failure, the whole team attends the wake. Upon viewing the corpse, Brennan insists the death was no accident and enlists Booth to help her steal the body.

programme.title: Bones: The Girl in the Mask
programme.desc: Booth's detective friend, Ken Nakamura, calls him from Tokyo in a panic when his sister Sachi goes missing in Washington. Booth and Brennan are on the case, and their investigation leads them to a grizzly discovery in a canal.

programme.title: Movie: The Dark Knight Rises
programme.desc: Batman makes his return to Gotham when Bane, a new underground terrorist, threatens to take over the city.

programme.title: Movie: Jonah Hex
programme.desc: A bounty hunter, with warrants out for his own arrest, is hired by the United States military. In exchange for his freedom, the bounty hunter must stop a terrorist from unleashing hell on Earth.

programme.title: Arrow: The Offer
programme.desc: Still weighed down by his last meeting, Oliver returns home to find a new villain and his crew have started terrorizing Starling City.

programme.title: Arrow: Suicidal Tendencies
programme.desc: It's celebration time as Diggle and Lyla get married. However, Deadshot interrupts their honeymoon and tells them the Suicide Squad has been given a new mission, to rescue a United States senator.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Second Line
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a Navy lieutenant during a French Quarter second line funeral procession, a New Orleans tradition that celebrates the recently deceased with a musical parade.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Collateral Damage
programme.desc: After a navy lieutenant dies during a clandestine visit to a general's hotel room, Special Agent Pride and the team are asked to break standard protocol for the murder investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Help Wanted
programme.desc: A navy culinary specialist is the target of an explosion while visiting her family's 100-year-old restaurant in the French Quarter. Also, Brody is in D.C. tracking a lead in the General leak case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Down the Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: After Pride is spotted tracking one of Mayor Hamilton's accomplices, the suspect opens fire on a crowded street before disappearing.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Poetic Justice
programme.desc: Unable to trust anyone in New Orleans, the NCIS team calls in FBI Assistant Director Isler to help expose and stop the sinister scheme Mayor Hamilton has planned for the residents of Clearwater.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Rogue Nation
programme.desc: While Pride remains on probation six weeks after his rogue takedown of the corrupt Mayor Hamilton, his team is closely monitored. Also, when the FBI arrives to run lead on a case involving a stolen rig of nuclear waste the team must investigate.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: #1 Fan
programme.desc: While preparing to leave on a fishing trip, Martha Roberts, an erratic whistleblower who calls Pride her mentor, kidnaps him to help her locate a serial killer targeting young women in the Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Movie: Blade

programme.title: Movie: Blade II
programme.desc: A vampire-human hybrid struggles to save the human race from those who want to destroy it.

programme.title: Movie: Blade: Trinity
programme.desc: Blade teams up with vampire hunters to stop the vampires from taking over the world.

programme.title: Movie: A Walk Among the Tombstones

programme.title: Movie: Safe House
programme.desc: A rookie CIA agent finds himself on the run with a fugitive after the safe house he was protecting is attacked by mercenaries.

programme.title: Movie: Taken
programme.desc: Agent Bryan Mills left the service to be closer to his daughter Kim. When she goes on a tour of France, she is kidnapped by human traffickers and Bryan does everything in his power to get her back.

programme.title: The Rifleman: The Wyoming Story

programme.title: Movie: Love's Complicated
programme.desc: Leah thinks all is fine coasting in her relationship with Edward who enrolls her in a conflict-management class. She locks horns with a radio-talk show host but develops new friendships and inner strength.

programme.title: Movie: Bottled With Love
programme.desc: After being stood up, Abbey gets inspired to open her heart in a letter, put it in a bottle and toss it out to sea. Months later, a man fishing discovers it and opts to reach out.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Winter
programme.desc: A woman flies to Europe for some soul searching, and sight-seeing, with a friend. While there she encounters a handsome European playboy prince.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Under the Stars
programme.desc: A man loses his job right before Christmas, so he takes a temporary job selling trees. While at work, he meets a woman and her son, who are dealing with the sudden loss of her father. The two get to talking, and out of their loss, love grows.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: Love Under the Rainbow
programme.desc: A woman has dreamt her whole life about finding her true love and starting a family. Now, she's a teacher who is still on her quest for love. When a new architect moves to town, romance is in the air for both of them.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweeter Side of Life
programme.desc: A woman is left penniless after her divorce, and though she wants nothing more than to return to her high-class life, spending time with her father in her hometown causes her to see things differently.

programme.title: Movie: Date With Love
programme.desc: After a-list actress, Alex Allen, has an epic Hollywood meltdown, she is in need of some positive publicity. Salvation comes in the form of a small town boy's video 'promposal' in which the student invites Alex to prom.

programme.title: Movie: Love, Fall and Order
programme.desc: A woman returns home to save her dad's annual fall festival on her family's pumpkin farm. While there, she runs into an old rival, and sparks fly.

programme.title: Movie: Marrying Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A man and woman are very different people; she's a down-to-earth high school teacher and he's a reserved New York businessman. So, when they get engaged, their trip to the altar is lively and unpredictable.

programme.title: Movie: Love in Paradise
programme.desc: A Western movie star is forced to spend a weekend doing PR at a dude ranch. When his fans learn he's terrified of horses, he sets out to prove to them that he really does have what it takes to be a rancher.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her. They find their love of skating goes far beyond the ice.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A woman burned by a boyfriend on New Year’s escapes on a ski getaway and is snowed in with a handsome entrepreneur.

programme.title: Futurama
programme.desc: Fry, a pizza delivery boy, is frozen in 1999 and awakens 1,000 years later, on December 31st 2999.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans
programme.desc: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.

programme.title: South Park: Obama Wins!
programme.desc: There's something in Cartman's bedroom that may change the Presidential election outcome.

programme.title: South Park: Handicar
programme.desc: Timmy's successful new car service makes him a lot of enemies.

programme.title: South Park: Dead Kids
programme.desc: Randy is desperate to help Sharon get her emotions under control and Cartman unexpectedly fails his math test.

programme.title: South Park: Hummels and Heroin
programme.desc: Beloved entertainers are being cut down in their prime due to massive overdoses of opiates. Stan is about to be exposed as the source of the illegal drugs.

programme.title: South Park: Human Cent-iPad
programme.desc: Kyle is intimately involved in the development of a revolutionary new product that is about to be launched by Apple. Meanwhile, Cartman doesn't even have a regular iPad yet, a problem he blames his mother for.

programme.title: South Park: Go Fund Yourself
programme.desc: The boys name their new start-up company 'The Washington Redskins.'

programme.title: South Park: You Have 0 Friends
programme.desc: When Kyle begs Stan to 'friend' him, Stan gets sucked into the world of Facebook. Kyle gets a hard lesson about the politics of Facebook when he friends the least popular kid in school.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled Whore Video Play Set
programme.desc: Disturbed by the corruptive influence Paris Hilton has on all little girls in South Park, one of the town's favourite citizens, Mr. Slave, challenges her to a 'whore-off.'

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me
programme.desc: When a 32-year-old man claiming to be Stan from the future shows up in South Park, young Stan is forced to come to terms with the loser he will become.

programme.title: South Park: Royal Pudding
programme.desc: The Prince of Canada is about to take a Princess and Ike is obsessed with the Royal Wedding.

programme.title: Bill Burr Presents: The Ringers: Rosebud Baker, Jordan Temple, Josh Adam Meyers
programme.desc: Rosebud Baker reveals her grandfather was a secretary of state, Jordan Temple recounts getting pulled over in a cab, and Josh Adam Meyers critiques a Journey music video.

programme.title: South Park: The Tale of Scrotie McBoogerballs
programme.desc: The boys are given a controversial book to read in school and it inspires them to write one of their own. They convince Butters to take credit for the filth that they have written, but become jealous when he is hailed as a literary genius.

programme.title: South Park: Smug Alert!
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park: Pre-School
programme.desc: Trent Boyett, the kid who took the fall for the boys five years ago is getting out of Juvie, and his first order of business is revenge. Fearful for their lives, Stan, Cartman, Kyle and Kenny hire sixth graders and Stan's sister as bodyguards.

programme.title: South Park: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: The children of South Park are drawn to 'Mr. Jefferson,' the new neighbour in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get 'Mr. Jefferson' to love him best.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: The South Park Elementary School Talent Show is coming up and Jimmy can't wait to perform his comedy routine. But first he must find a way to gain control of his raging hormones.

programme.title: South Park: You're Not Yelping
programme.desc: Cartman considers himself the top online restaurant reviewer in South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Do the Handicapped Go to Hell?
programme.desc: The boys become obsessed with religion and redemption after they're scared by a sermon about Hell. Meanwhile, Saddam returns to Hell and tries to have Satan's new boyfriend 'taken care of.'

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Wedding Crasher
programme.desc: Jenna, a young dressmaker, looks for a wedding of her own as an escape from her abusive aunt. After meeting engaged couple Marci and Glenn, Jenna is convinced that Glenn should be hers and will do anything to make it happen.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Stripper
programme.desc: A dance studio instructor becomes the obsession of the male exotic dancer from her bachelorette party who will stop at nothing to keep her from getting married.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Mother-In-Law
programme.desc: A woman is thrilled to finally walk down the aisle, that is, until her mother, and mother-in-law to be have a fateful encounter that leaves the entire wedding in shambles.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Deadly Trespass
programme.desc: When a wealthy neighbor begins buying up Montana land and restricting access to the public mountain trails beyond, one man cuts the locks and ends up dead.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Foundation of Lies
programme.desc: The wife of a noted doctor goes missing and authorities believe it may have to do with an allegedly shady adoption ring until her husband goes house-shopping with another woman claiming to be his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dew Process
programme.desc: The wife of a well-known dentist is found dead, and her husband injured. Investigators use some fibres and a study of local weather patters the night of the murder to catch the guilty party.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing in Time
programme.desc: A young woman was reported missing after a fight with her husband. She was presumed to be dead and her husband was the prime suspect. Police were suspicious of a secondary suspect when he reported a suspicious fire in his car.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Ambition
programme.desc: A Seattle policeman’s home is destroyed by an arsonist. One month later, the officer arrests a low-level drug dealer, who confesses to the arson. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators begin to question the authenticity of his confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Memories
programme.desc: A pregnant woman is brutally attacked in her own home and her unborn child is killed. After coming out of her coma, and regaining her memory, she identifies her husband as the perpetrator. A new DNA test lead investigators to a different suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Evidence
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters: Aerial Opal Spotting
programme.desc: The mining season is almost over, to reach their target, Col's crew take one last gamble opal spotting from the air.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Jacks Be Boiling
programme.desc: Justin and fellow Captain Kyle Pitts speed down the Intercoastal Waterway to find Jack Crevalle in a feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Stranglehold
programme.desc: Dusty Crum and his team of snake hunters devise a plan to stop Florida's invasive pythons from spreading north and becoming a national emergency.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Snake Researcher

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker
programme.desc: Just when Mike thought he had seen it all, he is hired at a cow farm that specializes in making gardening pots out of cattle poop. Mike later opens up the mailbag and answers a viewer's question on a segment where Mike is bitten by a snake.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Wild Goose Chase
programme.desc: A team of workers round up a flock of wild geese in the tundra, with airplanes.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Leather Tanner

programme.title: The Misery Index: Check Out This Sucker!
programme.desc: Learn which of the Tenderloins’ mom came out to witness a doctor retrieving a live animal from a nose. A fart professional and someone caught before the act compete for prize.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Whippit
programme.desc: In an ice cream shop, Michael whips up a mind-boggling app; at party store, he spills the tea on a self-brewing decoration; and at a farm, Michael's helper looks like he saw a ghost after a run-in with a spirited scarecrow.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: There's Life in Here
programme.desc: Michael gives a confused woman the license to speed at the DMV, unclogs a 'crumby' toaster at a return counter, and blows the mind of a beach attendant with a scaly encounter from under the sea.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Prehistoric Fossil Breeding
programme.desc: Michael schools a man on fish fossil breeding at a rock store and colours with his tongue at a paint store. Then, on a construction site, Michael and his helper dig up a skeleton that still has some life in it.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Sorcery or Science
programme.desc: Michael sweetens a woman's day at a candy store when a chocolate bunny eats her ring, and at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, he inflates pretzels at a snack stand. Plus, one of Michael's tricks gets flushed down the tubes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vanishing Daycare
programme.desc: Michael transforms a t-shirt at a thrift store, and his aid at a daycare thinks she loses more than her mind. Plus, Michael's helper at a museum runs scared when a sculpture slithers away.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Universal Appeal

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Paradise Lost

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Chaunte Wayans

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss

programme.desc: Michael uncovers ancient secrets at an Asian gift shop, reveals a transformative spray at Eataly and leaves his assistant speechless at a photo shoot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Simon Soft
programme.desc: Michael turns iced tea into a tea candle and later, at a pet store, he reveals that caterpillars have wicks. Plus, at a warehouse, Michael stumps his assistant when he proves that big tricks come in shrink-wrapped packages.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Vegan Plant
programme.desc: Michael feeds a cannibalistic plant at a garden center, and at the tuxedo store, he sells a tie that literally suits itself. Plus, at a hockey rink, Michael's assistant is speechless with a trick so electric it melts the ice.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: While working in a cheese store, Michael milks the reaction of a woman stunned by breeding brie. Later, Michael nails down the perfect app in a salon and unpacks a trick in an airport that ruffles his assistant's feathers.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Fright at the Museum
programme.desc: At a campsite, Michael turns rain into wine and has an app that gives new meaning to the 'call of nature.' Later, Michael gets thorny at a plant shop, and in a museum, he drums up ancient history that grasps for the present.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dummy Talks
programme.desc: At an appliance store, a man goes bananas over Michael's self-stocking fridge. Then, Michael speeds up the life cycle of a frog in a science lab, and he pulls the strings at an estate sale when a haunted doll toys with his assistant.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Home Run Away
programme.desc: At a deli, Michael bakes bread with power tools, and in a tux store, his outfit change doesn't suit his customer. Plus, at the stadium for the Chicago White Sox, Michael swings for the fences with a fiery trick that stuns his helper.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: Hack My Life
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin hack a cellphone to the limit with a hot glue gun. Then, they test user-submitted hacks to see which one will bring flowers back from the dead. Finally, Kevin and Brooke tests an unexpected leaf blower hack.

programme.title: Hack My Life: The Key to Hacks
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke find out if a salty hack will stop slippery shoes in their tracks, Brooke turns an ex's bad taste in vinyl records into a fun candy bowl, and Kevin gets to the bottom of some manipulative grocery store hacks.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hacks by the Poolside
programme.desc: Brooke and Keving go head-to-head testing out hacks to make your pool party the event of the year. Then, they put a bug-saving hack to the test, and Kevin steps into a wrestling ring to learn some confidence-boosting hacks.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack to the Future
programme.desc: Lazy cook Brooke hacks edible shot glasses for your next house party. Kevin and Brooke find out if they can use the office coffee machine to hack their breakfast. Plus, learn about better ways to cope with some emotional hacks from the future.

programme.title: The Misery Index: Men of Intellect

programme.desc: Three single guys have sworn to remain bachelors in support of their heartbroken friend. As their current conquests become more than flings, the trio is tasked with keeping their relationships under wraps, and must examine just where things are headed.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Woman of the Year
programme.desc: Leslie is outraged when Ron wins the 'Woman of the Year' award for a project she started. Tom is desperate to find some money to invest in a local Pawnee club.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Possum
programme.desc: When a possum bites the mayor's dog on a golf course, Leslie is asked to form a task force to catch the pesky animal. Meanwhile, Ron is upset when Mark refuses to bend the rules for him.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Park Safety
programme.desc: After Jerry gets mugged by a bunch of kids, Leslie meets with the park rangers in hopes of improving park safety.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Summer Catalog
programme.desc: Leslie decides to take Ron and the past directors of the park on a picnic while she is preparing for the Summer Events Catalogue.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: 94 Meetings
programme.desc: Ron is angry with April when she schedules a ton of meetings for him, while Leslie fights to preserve a historical landmark.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Telethon
programme.desc: Leslie hosts the late-night shift for a local telethon and lands former Indiana Pacer Detlef Schrempf as a celebrity guest.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Master Plan
programme.desc: Leslie is disappointed when her park plans are put on hold by a visit from two state auditors. April has plans for Andy at her birthday party, and Ann is putting together a romantic mystery.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Freddy Spaghetti
programme.desc: Ben prevents Leslie from holding a children's concert so she takes matters into her own hands. Mark makes some big decisions about his life.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Go Big or Go Home
programme.desc: Leslie tries to convince Chris and Ben to give the parks department more money, but when she fails to persuade them, she enlists Ann's help. Meanwhile, Ron and Andy coach youth basketball.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Flu Season
programme.desc: While planning for a local festival, Leslie is struck hard with the flu and ends up in the hospital.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Time Capsule
programme.desc: Leslie wants to bury a time capsule that showcases life in Pawnee, but is thrown off by an odd suggestion.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Ron and Tammy: Part Two
programme.desc: Tom tries to get back at Ron by going on a date with his ex-wife, Tammy. Leslie tries to prevent Ron from falling for Tammy's charming ways.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Media Blitz
programme.desc: Leslie does a series of interviews while trying to get the word out about the Harvest Festival. A media storm ensues when Ben has to answer questions about his past as a teen mayor.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Indianapolis
programme.desc: Leslie and Ron head to Indianapolis to receive a commendation for the upcoming Harvest Festival.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Harvest Festival
programme.desc: With the fate of her entire department hinging on the success of Harvest Festival, Leslie must deal with last-minute problems including a tribal leader who is threatening to put a curse on the entire event.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Camping
programme.desc: Leslie takes the whole department camping in order to brainstorm new ideas.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Fancy Party
programme.desc: Andy and April host a dinner party for all of their friends; Ben asks Leslie for some career advice.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Soulmates
programme.desc: Ann convinces Leslie to sign up for an online dating service, only to be matched with someone she already knows.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Jerry's Painting
programme.desc: Jerry's contribution to Leslie's community arts show causes a stir. Ben moves in with April and Andy in order to teach them how to behave like adults.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Eagleton
programme.desc: When the neighbouring city of Eagleton erects a fence around one of their parks, Leslie must get her former best friend to take it down.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Fight
programme.desc: When Leslie tries to get Anne a job at City Hall, Anne's lukewarm reaction causes their first fight. Tom invites the entire department to the Snakehole Lounge to promote his new drink.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Road Trip
programme.desc: When Chris sends Leslie and Ben to Indianapolis, Leslie is worried she will make a move on Ben. Ron teaches a young student about his views on government.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: The Bubble
programme.desc: Everyone in the office is unhappy when Chris decides to make some big changes in the parks department.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation: Li'l Sebastian
programme.desc: Leslie and the parks team put together a memorial service for a dearly departed friend. Meanwhile, Tom makes a big life decision.

programme.title: Movie: What to Expect When You're Expecting
programme.desc: Five interconnected couples come to understand love and that life does not always deliver what you expect.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Time Tested Treasures
programme.desc: Host John Catucci travels to Ontario's wilderness to discover a hidden gem in Busters BBQ, where blueberries are the key to killer sauce. John also visits the Argo Café in Vancouver, B.C. where they serve up everything from your typical diner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Decadent Dishes
programme.desc: Guy goes coast-to-coast for decadent dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tried and True
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a roadside shack in Kittery serving the same fried clam recipe since 1956. He also visits a go to burger spot in Washington, D.C., and an Italian joint that has been around for 45 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Homemade and Homebrewed
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's mixing' his love of home cooking with his appreciation of homebrew. In Chicago, Ill., a dive refines small plate Mexican with dishes like shiitake mushroom empanadas and flautas with homemade queso fresco.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Old Faves, New Craves
programme.desc: In Annapolis, Maryland, two Irish brothers serving up food from their homeland with a twist, like Guinness fried oysters with homemade coleslaw.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fish, Fries and Feet
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's tackling everything from land to sea. In Des Moines, the funky fusion joint serving up unique burritos alongside off-the-chain bulgogi masa fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Goin' International
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbin' gangster global grub. In Houston, a Jamaican joint knocking it out of the park with their oxtail and curry goat. Plus, a Lebanese stop serving up mom's specialties like kibbie balls and kabobs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From The Sea
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to see what the Triple D Nation is cookin' up from under the sea. For starters, an oyster shuckin' shack is putting a new spin on an old favorite in the Big Easy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Grab and Grub
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into joints where you can literally grab all kinds of grub, starting with a Chicago-style spot in Tucson, Ariz., firing up deep-dish pie and twisted-up breadsticks.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Rollin' in the Dough
programme.desc: Guy visits Mesa, Arizona for a legit Hawaiian joint serving island specialities including a meaty bun, and Tucson for a place serving up saucy sandwiches and spinach dip calzones.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: A Little Lighter
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is lightening the load on this trip, starting in Boston, where he pops into Triple D's first diner to check out the egg-white omelets. Then, a Cuban joint in Los Angeles is trading in bread for plantains and stuffing avocado with fresh fish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken Trifecta
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's diggin' into some winner winner chicken dinners! In Maui, Hawaii, it's a star-studded stop at Mick Fleetwood's joint serving the rocker's mom's favourite chicken, plus a dish that musician Sammy Hagar dives right into.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Coastal Cuisine
programme.desc: The sun is out and the surf is high as Guy Fieri hits up some ultimate DDD spots by the shore. First, he's in Honolulu to say 'Hi' to an old buddy who's reelin' in fresh poke and smokin' pork by the plateful.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Loaded, Stuffed and Fried
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and digging into joints that are loading it, stuffing it and frying it. In Santa Fe, N.M., a farm-to-table gem putting out hearty goodness like bison gravy fries and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Flavor Adventure
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's taking a culinary trip filled with adventurous flavour. In Los Angeles, a funky spot is all about filling bowls with eclectic eats. In Norfolk, Virginia, a market and restaurant has Mexican specialties that you probably haven't seen before.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bird and Beef
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns to bagels. In Portsmouth, an amped up deli serves up lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl: Inside the Bowl: Aberdeen's Four Touchdown Game

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slamming Snake Tank: Supersized
programme.desc: Dwight Howard is back again for his second, third, fourth tank and more. This basketball legend has moved since the guys last saw him and he needs the guys at ATM to design and build a habitat for all 14 of his snakes.

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slithering Slam Dunk
programme.desc: A call from NBA star Dwight Howard sends Brett and Wayde to Houston. But Howard doesn't just want a fish tank, he also wants a new habitat for his two snakes!

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: Basketball Magic
programme.desc: NBA All-Star John Wall wants a Vegas-themed aquarium and Brett and Wayde create a rolling dice masterpiece. Meanwhile, Shaq keeps on truckin' with an aquarium built inside the front end of an 18-wheeler.

programme.desc: Dwight Howard is back again for his second, third, fourth tank and more. This basketball legend has moved since the guys last saw him and he needs the guys at ATM to design and build a habitat for all 14 of his snakes.

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slithering Slam Dunk
programme.desc: A call from NBA star Dwight Howard sends Brett and Wayde to Houston. But Howard doesn't just want a fish tank, he also wants a new habitat for his two snakes!

programme.title: Tanked!: NBA Wizardry
programme.desc: NBA All-Star John Wall asks ATM to build an aquarium shaped like a giant pair of dice. In Georgia they build a huge lighthouse aquarium for a local seafood restaurant that includes engraved dolphins.

programme.title: Tanked!: Shaq-Sized
programme.desc: Basketball legend Shaquille O'Neal requests an aquarium built inside the front end of a semi-truck. Meanwhile, a Vegas illusionist asks the guys to help him recreate an old Houdini escape trick but with fish.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Bulldog Bellyache
programme.desc: Yuki the bulldog ate something she shouldn't have and it's up to Dr. Blue to find it. Dr. Lavigne and his wife learn how to do alternative home care on Suki, a rescue cat his family adopted after he performed amputation surgery on both of her front legs.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Yogi Goat
programme.desc: After treating a 'yoga' goat, Dr. Blue brings his best 'namaste' to a herd house call. Dr. Lavigne has his hands full with a trained protection dog who's not a fan of him or the cameras. A party reveals if the Blue's will be adding pink to their family.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Pardon My Frenchie
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne treats a French bulldog with a very vocal breathing problem that requires special surgery, before joining Dr. Blue on a pet pig transport. Dr. Ross has an exam with a 'pig' of his own. Gurgi the guinea pig who is coughing and sneezing.

programme.title: The Vet Life: This Little Piggy Has Mites
programme.desc: An itchy pig with a mean bite tries to take a chunk out of Dr. Blue, while Dr. Lavigne uses a unique method to fix a small dog's broken leg. Dr. Ross helps a rescue dog whose injuries may have gone untreated for too long. The docs go for gold at CyFair.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Calendar Boys
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne must decide during surgery if a giant schnauzer can keep his ear. A poodle named Jay-Z with suspicious symptoms needs Dr. Blue's help. Dr. Ross removes tumors from a rat. The vets pose with pets for a calendar to help animals in Haiti.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Lumpy Duck
programme.desc: Dr. Ross closely examines a duck with a lump in his throat. Dr. Lavigne uses x-ray film during surgery in a very unexpected way, while Dr. Blue tries to uncover a guinea pig mystery at the clinic. Dr. Lavigne's wife joins a local roller derby team.

programme.title: The Vet Life: The Dog Ate My Shorts
programme.desc: Dr. Blue must figure out what's wrong with Niko, a lethargic dog that may have eaten his mom's shorts. Dr. Lavigne operates on a husky with a torn ligament and Dr. Ross faces an emergency with his own family pet. The vets treat Cy-Fair to a crawfish boil.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Operation Dalmatian
programme.desc: Dr. Blue performs a difficult surgery on a Dalmatian being weighed down by a grapefruit-sized tumor on his head. Dr. Ross brings his family together to get a service dog for his brother Tedric, who has been suffering from seizures his whole life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Cat vs. Robot
programme.desc: Dr. Blue quarantines a dog who may be suffering with the flu, while Dr. Ross treats a wobbly boxer whose limbs never fully formed. Dr. Lavigne thinks a robot vacuum is to blame for a stressed-out cat and performs emergency surgery to save a puppy's life.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Llama Drama
programme.desc: Dr. Lavigne is tasked at removing a six-pound mass from a small dog, Dr. Blue and wife welcome their first daughter to the family. The vets make a house call to a llama that's causing some drama. Dr. Ross extracts a whopping 14 teeth from a mini poodle.

programme.title: Snapped: Monique Kitts
programme.desc: A successful daycare owner finds her husband dead after an alleged home invasion, but police discover a shocking double life and a murder plan full of possible accomplices.

programme.title: Snapped: Robyn Davis
programme.desc: Profiles of fascinating cases of women accused of murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: While They Were Sleeping
programme.desc: It was a brutal and baffling crime: a husband shot dead in his own bed. No one else in the house was hurt, not even his wife, who was sleeping beside him. Investigators were suspicious, but there were more surprises in store.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Devil and Bobbi Parker
programme.desc: It's a mystery with a mind-boggling twist. The deputy warden's wife claimed she was kidnapped by an escaped convict and held captive for more than a decade. But was she really a hostage or a willing accomplice?

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Stovalls
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs
programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams
programme.desc: Raised in a strict home, sheltered from the outside world, Matthew and Tyler believe it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin. When two men are found dead the brother's connection to them points toward a hateful trail of crime.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers
programme.desc: Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history. With an arsenal of weapons, their plan for notoriety begins at home in their quiet Oklahoma suburb.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bondurants
programme.desc: A pair of larger than life identical twins commit a series of brutal attacks in a small Tennessee town. With each crime, the brothers grow more emboldened. As time goes on and with little evidence against them, there's no telling how far they'll go.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Vues
programme.desc: When a correctional officer is murdered it seems like an act of vengeance, but soon a love triangle is exposed. After learning his wife is having an affair, a husband plans to kill her lover and enlists the help of his brothers to carry out the task.

programme.title: Movie: Warcraft
programme.desc: Azeroth is suddenly invaded by an army of orcs led by Durotan, fleeing their world. Anduin leads the humans in their defense. The two leaders are thrown on a collision course which will decide the fate of their people, their families, and their world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whacking Day
programme.desc: Everyone in Springfield is excited for Whacking Day, a decade-long tradition which calls for the townspeople to beat snakes to death with sticks. But leave it to Lisa to spoil the town's fun when she condemns the holiday as violent.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge in Chains
programme.desc: Marge gets busted for shoplifting at the Kiwk-E-Mart and is sentenced to 30 days in prison. Bart concocts a brilliant scheme to break her out of jail that involves a party dress, a wig and a crowbar.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Krusty Gets Kancelled
programme.desc: When Krusty the Clown's show gets cancelled, Bart and Lisa enlist the help of Krusty's Hollywood pals like Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler, Elizabeth Taylor and the Red Hot Chili Peppers to save the show.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer's Barbershop Quartet
programme.desc: After the kids find an album cover with Homer's picture on it, Homer reveals that he used to perform in a barbershop quartet with Principal Skinner, Chief Wiggum and Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cape Feare
programme.desc: Bart suspects everybody when he receives a threatening letter written in blood. He finds out that the letters are from Sideshow Bob, who's been writing the threats in prison and will soon be released on parole.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to College
programme.desc: Homer fails a competency test and must go back to college to keep his job. At college, he selects the nerds and the crusty Dean as his mortal enemies based on his preconceived notions of what college is like from old 1980s films.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rosebud
programme.desc: When Mr. Burns wants to get his favourite stuffed bear, Bobo, back from Maggie Simpson, he offers Homer one million dollars and three Hawaiian islands in exchange for the toy. Meanwhile, Smithers organizes a birthday party for Mr. Burns.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror IV
programme.desc: Homer gives up his soul for a single doughnut and Bart has a nightmare about a bus crash.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Marge on the Lam
programme.desc: Marge and her new friend, Ruth, channel Thelma and Louise as the two ladies run from Chief Wiggum and Homer after it's revealed that Ruth is driving a stolen car.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's Inner Child
programme.desc: While at a self-help seminar, Bart is singled out by the lecturer and the townspeople are told they should strive to be more like him. Chaos soon reigns.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Tweentrepreneurs
programme.desc: Tina, Louise and Gene get a taste of business when they join the school's Tweentrepeneurs club. Back at the restaurant, Bob and Linda find themselves outsmarted by a dine-and-dasher.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Nightmare on Ocean Avenue Street
programme.desc: The kids set out for their regular Halloween shenanigans, but when everyone's candy bags start mysteriously disappearing, it's up to Tina, Louise and Gene to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Teddy decorates the restaurant to compete with another handyman.

programme.title: Family Guy: The Unkindest Cut
programme.desc: Quagmire's most treasured body part gets cut off in a freak accident and he is forced to learn how to live without it. Meanwhile, Stewie and Brian search for Mort after learning there is a $10,000 reward for turning him into the police.

programme.title: Family Guy: Trans-Fat
programme.desc: Peter is mistakenly identified as transgender, which leads to an unexpected event and an important learning lesson.

programme.title: Archer: Sitting
programme.desc: Archer’s first weekend alone with baby AJ is soiled by a Pakistani intelligence officer.

programme.title: Archer: Nellis
programme.desc: A rescue mission turns into an out-of-this-world visit to Area 51.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle

programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Pompeii's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: An eerie complex of underground tunnels snake beneath a volcano near the ruins of Pompeii, and some believe these passages were intended as a gateway to hell. New discoveries are revealing exactly why they were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: City of the Damned
programme.desc: A deserted town in Spain with a bloody past and a ghost fleet heading nowhere are homes to dark secrets.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ramses' Buried Treasures
programme.desc: The treasures of Ramses II are found at Abu Simbel, a giant temple carved into a desert cliff over 3,000 years ago, and new discoveries at this marvel reveal the secrets of ancient Egypt's greatest pharaoh.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mount Rushmore: The Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Delving into the dark secrets behind one of the most iconic landmarks in America: Mount Rushmore. Scientists reveal the secret history of its creation, and what lies behind the rock.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hitler's Lost Bunker
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler's underground bunker was the home of some of the greatest secrets of the Nazi's. Now, experts use cutting-edge tech to discover new evidence of Hitler's evil vision for global domination.

programme.title: Unearthed: Ghosts of the Wild West
programme.desc: The gunfight at Tombstone's OK Corral turned Wyatt Earp into an American folk hero, and to find what really happened here, experts use the newest tech to discover what caused the fatal shootout and what it reveals about the dark secrets of the Wild West.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of the Seven Wonders
programme.desc: The Seven Wonders are the engineering marvels built by great minds of long-lost civilizations, but we're not sure if some even existed. New discoveries and cutting-edge archaeological methods might prove what they looked like and why they disappeared.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Tut's Curse: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal if King Tut's tomb is indeed cursed, as it is said to have killed nine people. The latest science might finally answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to investigate more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Curse of the Screaming Mummy
programme.desc: The Screaming Mummy is one of Egypt's greatest mysteries: a mummy with a terrifying expression frozen in agony. New discoveries reveal the connection between this horrific discovery and a pharaoh's murder, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Secrets of the Scorpion King
programme.desc: New evidence suggests that the mythological Scorpion King might have actually existed. New discoveries might answer this ancient mystery, and experts use modern-day tech to reveal more of Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Ramses' Forbidden City
programme.desc: Explorers in search of a lost city built by Ramses II uncover startling evidence that reveals the extent of ancient Egypt's scientific knowledge, and the new discoveries at this strange site offer more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Lost City of the Sun Cult
programme.desc: When experts unearth a mysterious lost city built by an infamous pharaoh, they find clues of a grisly catastrophe. New discoveries reveal the apocalyptic events that turned this place into hell on earth, offering more clues to Egypt's darkest secrets.

programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team of experts analyze the authenticity of a recently revealed mystery confession letter. New evidence emerges that may break the case wide open.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Devil in a Red Suit
programme.desc: The investigative team dives into the chaotic relationship between Tupac Shakur and his label head, Marion (Suge) Knight. They explore whether Tupac's departure from Death Row was motive enough for Suge to turn on their friendship.

programme.title: Who Killed Tupac?: Death Row Takeover
programme.desc: Benjamin Crump and his team of experts examine the rumored Death Row coup that may have led to Tupac's murder.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Folsom
programme.desc: An inside-the-walls look at the violent history of Folsom Prison, which opened in 1880.

programme.title: The Big House: The Lewisburg Federal
programme.desc: Examine the history and inmate roster of what was once America's most humane prison.

programme.title: The Big House: Parchman
programme.desc: Originally a slave plantation ruled by the whip, today Parchman's most important crop is neither food nor cotton, but prisoners.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Rookie Love
programme.desc: Rebecca is ten weeks in to her field training and makes a potentially fatal mistake. She and her boyfriend - also a rookie - must learn to deal with the realities that come with the dangerous job.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: The Shootout
programme.desc: Rookie Mark Monson doesn't like taking orders from his female boss; an overconfident marine who is now a cop responds to a 'shots fired' call.

programme.title: Rookies: Tampa: There's a New FTO in Town
programme.desc: Police rookie Amy is asked to put on the lights and sirens of her patrol car and race 'code' to calls. Dennis loses evidence from a drug arrest and his patrol car and his former Naval Petty Office wonders if he has what it takes.

programme.title: Rookies: Jefferson: Toy Gun
programme.desc: Rebecca Webster was the only female rookie in her Academy class. She knows that as a woman in a man's world, she's going to have to work twice as hard to prove herself. However, Rebecca's rush to do everything on her own just might backfire on her.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Frozen Heart
programme.desc: Glenn Godfrey was Alaska's top cop, but he may not be able to protect himself and his family from an evil force unleashed by an ill-advised romance.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Murder on Camera
programme.desc: Tiana Notice is young, beautiful, brilliant and lonely. That changes when she meets James Carter online. But when James reveals a dark secret, the two find themselves drawn into an increasingly dangerous and ultimately deadly battle of wits.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: The Appointment
programme.desc: Jennifer Snyder is a shy vet tech who falls for her boss, a driven young doctor. Overshadowing their steamy affair is a controlling wife and a surprise pregnancy announcement which sets in motion a cold blooded murder plot.

programme.title: Primal Instinct: Slow Burn
programme.desc: Tammy Lohr is a file clerk who is seduced by a decorated and very married cop. Things heat up when his wife receives an anonymous letter revealing the affair followed by a mysterious fire, a brutal stabbing and an elaborate plot to cover it up.

programme.title: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: Convenience store manager Terri Lemoine has always preferred the graveyard shift until a series of murders are committed within blocks of where she lives and works. As the body count rises, Terri grows more afraid of everyone who crosses her path.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Deadly Turn
programme.desc: A couple escapes the hazards of the big city and moves to a country community. But suspicion that their new neighbors are in the drug trade turns into bloody rage with children in caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: A Killer View
programme.desc: A young family builds their dream home in the Kentucky Hills, but their heaven is hell for the quiet couple living next door. Also, a dispute over a shared road leads to fireworks, fury, and cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Body Cam: Standoff
programme.desc: A man with an AK-47 steals a cop car taking fire at police during a 16-mile citywide chase; a home invasion call escalates into something far more terrifying.

programme.title: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: Convenience store manager Terri Lemoine has always preferred the graveyard shift until a series of murders are committed within blocks of where she lives and works. As the body count rises, Terri grows more afraid of everyone who crosses her path.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: The Millionaire's Mistress
programme.desc: Dionne Baugh begins a steamy affair with millionaire Lance Herndon behind her husband's back. Unknown to Dionne, Lance sees other women, underestimating the intensity of her feelings. Their lust triggers a deadly spiral towards jealousy and murder.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Visions of Lust
programme.desc: A devoted wife is caught off guard by a divine vision of her husband's infidelity. When one of his mistresses comes forward her suspicions are confirmed and a complex web of lust, lies and betrayal begins to unravel ending in the ultimate tragedy.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Original Amish Murderer
programme.desc: When Katie Gingerich is found murdered and disemboweled, even the most hardened police are shocked.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Amish Serial Killer
programme.desc: When the body of a 9-year-old boy is found by the side of a rural highway it takes police two years to identify him. The mystery leads police on a chilling odyssey into a secretive community and hot on the trail of an Amish serial killer.

programme.title: Murder in Amish Country: The Amish Stud
programme.desc: When a young Amish wife is found murdered in her bed, police uncover a dark world they never imagine existed.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Nothing Random
programme.desc: An elderly couple in Moscow, Idaho, frantically perform CPR on their young neighbor after a pop of gunfire interrupts their bedtime routine. Investigators follow fresh footprints from the scene, only to learn the killer may already be behind bars.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: It's love at first sight for 19-year-old Ashleigh Lindsey when she is introduced to Josh Mahaffey by his roommate Scott. But when she decides to move in with her new man, it soon becomes clear there's not room for all three of them under one roof.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Allan Pinkerton: Saving Lincoln
programme.desc: Celebrated P.I. Allan Pinkerton is hired to protect a strategic railroad from attack, but as his investigation unfolds, he uncovers a hidden conspiracy to assassinate President Lincoln.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Shot Above a Deli
programme.desc: What was planned as an easy robbery turns into The Carnegie Deli Murders. Sean Salley shoots an actress and her friends above a deli in New York, and flees to New Orleans and then to Miami where he plans to leave the country for good.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT a Handsome Face
programme.desc: Steven Ray Milam is addicted to robbing banks. After a string of heists, he's dubbed the Handsome Guy Bandit, thanks to a clever disguise. But his pride and a costly mistake put the FBI on his trail. He's forced to leave his family and go on the run.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt
programme.desc: After suffering a serious injury, Jaime Jones helplessly watches his bills and late notices on mortgage payments pile up. With his family's welfare at stake, he dons a disguise and robs banks to pay off his debts. But his greed will be his downfall.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Rob a Pawn Shop
programme.desc: Stolen weapons dealer, Conan Helsley, robs a pawnshop with his girlfriend and older brother. Cops eventually hunt them down and put the trio behind bars, but Conan manages to escape!

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Get Out of Debt

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Britain at Bay
programme.desc: By the end of June 1940, Hitler was victorious in Western Europe. Nazi Germany now controlled Denmark, Norway, the Netherlands, Belgium and France. Only Britain remained defiant. But the Fuehrer was certain that it could not hold out for long.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Defying the Nazis
programme.desc: We all think the U.S. started fighting the Nazi's after the Pearl Harbour attacks, but what you don't know are the stories behind some of the biggest deceptions, the top secrets and the secret weapons used to help defy the Nazis in WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Top Secret World War II
programme.desc: We've all heard about the ultra covert units used in WWII, the unbreakable codes, top secret underground nerve centers, and super-human navy seals, but here is what history forgot about WWII's most classified operations.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1839 Lofty Master Suite
programme.desc: Jeff Devlin and his team are recruited to bring back some much-needed character to the master suite of an 1839 farmhouse.

programme.title: Stone House Revival: 1785 Master Suite Rework
programme.desc: Jeff is recruited to open up a cramped master suite and rework the layout to make room for a huge walk-in shower. He and his team hope to expose a hidden original fireplace and find some additional stone in the bathroom.

programme.desc: A cupcake maker wins the opportunity to serve at a Match.com wedding event.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Three-Alarm Fire

programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
