programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Supernanny: Braido Family
programme.desc: Working parents, Jessica and CJ Braido, feel they're being overrun by their four small children and are at a loss at how to come together on their parenting perspectives.

programme.title: Supernanny: Corry Family
programme.desc: The Corry's are a military family struggling to discipline their four daughters.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho In-Law
programme.desc: Tina can't wait to marry Brock and everyone feels the same way, everyone but Joyce, Brock's former mother-in-law. Joyce does all she can to tear the happy couple apart, proving that she'll do whatever is necessary to stop them from getting married.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Prom Queen
programme.desc: A daughter becomes fast friends with the school's mean girl, her mother worries about the manipulation and obsession of teenage girls come prom season.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Cross
programme.desc: A naval officer is found brutally murdered after threatening to report harassment.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Textbook Murder
programme.desc: A woman is brutally murdered and police point to her fiancé when they learn that he was having affairs with other women. It is not until a man comes forward with information that he is no longer a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Obsession at the Office
programme.desc: When a lovers' spat ends up in the hospital parking lot, a biochemist’s obsession with a coworker and her murderous means are exposed.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Killing Spree
programme.desc: A string of murders targeting a pizza chain and its employees leads to a nationwide manhunt for a killer hell-bent on revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All That Glitters Is Gold
programme.desc: A bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses poses a mystery, until a tiny and unique clue is found.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Rebellion
programme.desc: Workers discovered a teen's half-naked body on the side of the road, her throat slit. Police hoped the single foreign hair found in a defensive wound on her thumb would lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Crime
programme.desc: Fire rips through a Seattle woman's apartment and some unsettling evidence is found in the rubble. Shortly after, a second fire breaks out just 100 feet from the first, and evidence points to a serial killer whose skills are evolving.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.desc: A family vacation turns tragic when a family matriarch suffers a tragic fall to her death. The circumstances surround the fall lead the investigators to think foul play was involved. Findings from a pathologist confirm their doubts.

programme.desc: Following a terrible fire in a mobile home, the medical examiner makes a startling discovery which sets off a dramatic turn of events.

programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial

programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Flying Scotsman
programme.desc: America's favourite Grizzlies welcome a Highland Games strongman, an Alaska Trooper and a Southwest aircraft handler to Bear Mountain to compete for fame or humiliation, and Bart makes sure the humans aren't the only mammals who end up in the water.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Born to Run
programme.desc: Bart the Bear faces the mightiest human yet in national arm-wrestling champion Bruce. Honey Bump schools Jersey girl Christina when it comes to running anything but her mouth. MMA fighter Jesse fights for a chance at a cage match with a grizzly.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Ultimate Underdog
programme.desc: A number of competitors take on America's favorite grizzly bear in hopes of being the ultimate underdog. Some come out on top, including a bodyguard, a firefighter, an ultra-marathoner and a world-record weightlifter.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Ultimate Underdog
programme.desc: A number of competitors take on America's favorite grizzly bear in hopes of being the ultimate underdog. Some come out on top, including a bodyguard, a firefighter, an ultra-marathoner and a world-record weightlifter.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Edge of Madness

programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Fishguise
programme.desc: Find out which trick was inspired by Michael's acting days, and which trick was modified because it was too messy.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: An Owner Losing Control
programme.desc: Robert returns to Bradenton, FL to follow up on Theresa’s Restaurant. Four years ago he helped pull the restaurant out of a rut and taught the owner some management techniques.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Cleaning Up in Mississippi
programme.desc: Chef Robert Irvine has his work cut out for him when he arrives in Ridgeland, Mississippi. Rossini's Cucina Italiana is filthy, and even worse, owners Lori and Toni seem to have given up. Robert rolls up his sleeves and prepares to get his hands dirty.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Masterpieces
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's bellying up for some big-time meaty masterpieces. All across the country, we've got everything from the bomb beef to killer barbecue, stacked up sandwiches, sizzling steaks and smokin' sausage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Stacked Up
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's searching out super-stacked sandwiches from Memphis to Miami, West Coast to the Southwest. He's diggin' into everything from pork belly to pastrami and American favorites to international flavors.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Breakfast, Brisket and Belly
programme.desc: Guy is in Los Angeles at a late-night spot with a twist, Columbus for a joint serving creative combos like brisket on corn flakes and Phoenix at a barbeque stop with smoked prime rib and pork belly dumplings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ocean Coasts and Great Lakes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from coast to coast and to the Great Lakes to dig up some dynamite dishes. In Los Angeles, a Mexican joint in Grand Central Market serves outrageous octopus tostadas and puts a lights-out spin on a burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Guy's All-Star Guests
programme.desc: Guy Fieri has a rock-star lineup kickin' it with him in the kitchen. First, in Kansas City, Mo., Chiefs' head coach Andy Reid tackles pigskin at a joint meticulous about their meat.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pretzels, Pork and Paella
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into everything from pretzels to paella. In Bozeman, Mont., a five-star take on breakfast with a Mexican pork masterpiece and a French toast Monte Cristo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Meals
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is embracing family-run spots on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, two brothers-in-law carryin' on a decades-long seafood tradition. In Richmond, Va., a mother-son duo running a breakfast, lunch and dinner joint in honor of their Pop.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Big Burgers To Little Italy
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from the bomb burgers to a taste of Italy. In Little Rock, Ark., a funky joint pairing their craft brews with all kinds of on-the-bun creations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Sandwiches To Stroganoff
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is digging into all kinds of hearty meals on this trip. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mash-up pilin' up smoked meat sensations. Plus a funky joint making big-time empanadas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Mary Poppins Show

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Apples to Apples Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby Flay offers up brunch recipes and menu ideas for any occasion.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Meze Fete
programme.desc: Guy Fieri invites some of his favorite chefs to the ranch to celebrate the exotic flavors and spices of the Middle East with small plates called mezes. Alex Guarnaschelli makes a delicious mix of savory and sweet with her spicy pork burger.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Celebrating 20 Years of Friendship
programme.desc: Valerie invites her three best friends over to celebrate two decades of friendship with hot spinach and crab dip, grilled eggplant parm, warm Brussels sprout salad, apricot Manhattans and a cream cheese cherry galette.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chicken, Chicken, Chicken
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is cooking up a storm with chicken, chicken... and more chicken! She demonstrates the benefits of bulk buying with three fantastic dishes: slow cooker chicken and broccoli, chicken pie and chicken kale caesar salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Feeding the Boys
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing the dinners and sweet treats that her sons love the most. There are chocolate spreads decorated with all sorts of fun and crazy toppings for football camp kids, and breakfast quesadillas make an easy on-the-go meal for when Bryce.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Competing Breakfasts
programme.desc: Ree's making Ladd's favorite slap-up platter, the Farmer's Breakfast, with over easy fried eggs, a slab of honey-glazed ham, fried sausage and bacon.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sunday at Chuck and Nan's
programme.desc: The whole family gathers in town for Sunday lunch at Ree's in-law's. Ladd's dad grills chicken a la Chuck while everyone is at church and Ree brings deviled bacon and eggs, pork lover's baked beans and country-style peach slab pie to feed a crowd.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Campfire Cookout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is putting together some delicious campfire favourites and reliving her childhood by camping out in her backyard. Her husband Nick is building the fire, and they've invited some old camp buddies to join the fun.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Twin City Treats
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli brings a taste of home to her friend, Minnesota native Melissa Peterman, tempting her with the best Midwest bounty.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Fishing and Dishing
programme.desc: Kardea is meeting her brother, Kedrick, at his favourite fishing hole to hopefully catch their dinner.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Family Reunion
programme.desc: Kardea Brown's family reunions are big, loud and legendary events. She's hosting the party at her Charleston, S.C., home and makes all the family favorites, including No-Fuss Baby Back Ribs with Carolina Moppin' Sauce and a beautiful 4-Bean Salad.

programme.title: The Kitchen: No Carb Left Behind
programme.desc: The Kitchen is having a celebration fully loaded with everyone's favorite carbs. Sunny Anderson kicks it off with an easy sausage and mushroom rigatoni pie, and Katie Lee takes on a bread basic, sundried tomato and rosemary focaccia.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Bottom's Up
programme.desc: Sixteen of the worst cooks in America enter boot camp with dreams of putting their kitchen nightmares behind them.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Extra Helpings
programme.desc: This trip, it's an exclusive peek at the lost footage of DDD: the places Guy Fieri's visited before, but all-new dishes never seen until now. Guy's digging in to money mussels, crispy pork skin and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Houston Ink

programme.title: North Woods Law: Baiters Beware
programme.desc: Fair chase is the gold standard of hunting, and in Maine, it's the law. Sgt. Simmons and Warden McKenney pursue a pair of brothers with bait piles. Warden Carter hunts for a father who may be teaching his son to poach. Warden Cross snares a trap thief.

programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Blindsided

programme.title: North Woods Law: When Duty Calls
programme.desc: Officers Murphy and Demler investigate a suspicious turkey kill while Officer Courtney rescues a scared fawn near a busy intersection. Officer Lucas races to save a sick loon and Officer Fluette helps a hiker find his father who is lost in the woods.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Schoolyard Bear
programme.desc: Officer Chris McKee attempts to remove a bear from a tree in a playground, while Officer Fluette picks out his new K9 partner. Officer Lucas searches for a group of ATVs. On the snowy summit of Mt. Washington, officers search for lost hikers.

programme.desc: Discover how car engines, flour, recliners and envelopes are made.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: Crime 360: Deadly Secrets
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ohio, lead homicide detective Wally Everett and his partner Mike Smith are called out to a crime scene where a body lays hidden between some hedges and the victim's grandmother's house.

programme.title: Crime 360: Killing Spree
programme.desc: After two men are shot, detectives follow the clues that lead them to a serial robber they've been tracking. After a third shooting results in death, the detectives work quickly to find this robber turned serial killer.

programme.title: Crime 360: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Det. Mocello responds to the scene of a suspicious fire in the bedroom of a first-floor apartment. He soon discovers that the deceased victim's charred body has sustained serious trauma.

programme.title: Crime 360: Final Call
programme.desc: Homicide detectives Thompson and Pence are called out to a bloody crime scene. A local tenant knows the victim, but claims to have no knowledge of the murder.

programme.title: Crime 360: Full House
programme.desc: Detectives use ballistics, DNA testing and fingerprint evidence to catch a killer who was part of a home burglary.

programme.title: Crime 360: Killing Field
programme.desc: On the morning of July 5th, the body of a victim is found in an abandoned lot that had been used to shoot off guns the night before in celebration in Independence Day. More than 60 shell casings are collected from the crime scene.

programme.title: Crime 360: Ashes to Ashes

programme.title: City Confidential: Deadly Odds in Biloxi
programme.desc: The shocking murders of attorney Vince Sherry and his politically active wife Margaret.

programme.title: Model Killers: Finger-Licking Good/ Slaying of a Tennessee Beauty Queen
programme.desc: A woman meets the perfect man to launch her modeling career, but is soon faced with a brutal reality. A beautiful farm girl moves to the city to pursue her modeling dreams, but winds up living a nightmare.

programme.title: Model Killers: Reality Kills
programme.desc: Three passionate, attractive men - and some very adoring fans - lust after a swimsuit model with a heart of gold.

programme.title: Model Killers: Model Murderer/ Strangled Beauty
programme.desc: An ambitious male model with a physique to die for is about to become an international sensation -- but not in a way he could have foreseen.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Twisted Plan
programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Life on the Line
programme.desc: Cousins Ana Franklin and Jennifer Holliday are traveling home late one night when terror strikes. As Jennifer is taken hostage by an unstable man, she soon connects with a 9-1-1 operator who will stop at nothing to see that Jennifer makes it out alive.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Never Let Go
programme.desc: A woman believes she may finally be free of her possessive ex-boyfriend, but months later, now in a new relationship, she can't help but feel she's being watched. The stalker's true identity is not at all what she imagined.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Play Dead
programme.desc: After 30-year-old single mom Kaye Robinson turns a suspicious late-night stranger away from her door, she has no idea the threat to her family is far from over. But with her young son in the home, she'll do everything in her power to keep him safe.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: John Walsh looks at whether Alicia Osibin may be responsible for her own mother's murder; Callahan speaks with Andrea, alleged victim of Frederick McLean's abuse, who is desperate for McLean's capture.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: Into the Woods
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, a string of murders of black children are terrorizing the city of Atlanta, igniting terror and frustration from a community that feels increasingly neglected.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Devil's Work
programme.desc: As the weeks pass, young black males are killed with horrifying frequency. An inventive tactic finally gives law enforcement their first real lead with suspect Wayne Williams, but they lack evidence for an arrest.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Requiem
programme.desc: After an intense investigation, Wayne Williams goes on trial for one of the most notorious murder cases in Atlanta's history. The public struggles with the question of Williams's guilt.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: Into the Woods
programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, a string of murders of black children are terrorizing the city of Atlanta, igniting terror and frustration from a community that feels increasingly neglected.

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Devil's Work

programme.title: The Atlanta Child Murders: The Requiem

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Daughter
programme.desc: John Walsh looks at whether Alicia Osibin may be responsible for her own mother's murder; Callahan speaks with Andrea, alleged victim of Frederick McLean's abuse, who is desperate for McLean's capture.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: Patricia Mills is killed in a house fire in Goliad, Texas. Her sister, suspicious the fire is deliberate, investigates. It takes 10 years to break the silence but the surprising culprit is finally trapped: the fire was arson, Patricia was murdered.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Silver Peak's Secret
programme.desc: Charlie Kinkel goes missing in a remote Nevada mining town. His wife Trayce investigates but is shunned by locals. When a body is discovered, detectives break down the silence to reveal Charlie's murder was a tragic case of misplaced suspicion.

programme.title: 20/20: A Case of 'Affluenza'
programme.desc: A privileged 16 year old with a troubled past, killed four innocent people while driving drunk. The defense team argument the teen suffered from 'affluenza'. This strategy worked and the teen did not go to jail.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Evil in Eden
programme.desc: Two brothers grow up in the shadow of Yosemite National Park. One, a victim of crime, becomes a national hero. The other, in the shadows, harbours feelings of rage that erupt into murderous violence and make him famous for a darker reason.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: We're Watching You
programme.desc: 40 year-old Rachael Anderson, mother of four, calls an old friend one Friday evening in April 2010 about a home improvement project she'd never complete. Eight years later, she's still missing, and two men are behind bars.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: In The Neighborhood
programme.desc: In May 2017, high school teacher Theresa Lockhart is a no-show at her confirmation sponsor's big event and she falls completely out of contact. When her car is discovered with nothing inside, police begin turning this placid community upside down.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: When Ashley Benson is found murdered in a trendy Portland hotel, detectives quickly dial in on three suspects, all of whom have been romantically linked to Ashley while Ashley's parents must come to grips with their daughter's secret life.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part" takes on a whole new meaning when a wife of thirty-four years loses the love of her life after he's kidnapped and she's nearly killed by his abductor. But nothing is what it seems in this gothic tale of murder, deceit and cover-up.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Unhinged
programme.desc: Three college students believe it's their calling to rid Portland of 'its sinners,' committing 'overkill' murders to make their point.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Once an Animal
programme.desc: A cold case from Northern California heats up when Detective Molly Daul ties a brutal assault case she's working on to this twelve year old murder. And when this killer strikes in Portland, multiple homicide detectives team up to take him down.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: L.A. Riots: As We Watched
programme.desc: The LA riots of 1992 shocked the nation. It was the most deadly civil unrest in American history. Over 3000 fires were set; over 50 people died; nearly a billion dollars in property damage. For six days in 1992, the world watched as LA burned.

programme.title: Mob Citizen: Joe Colombo
programme.desc: The story of mobster Joe Colombo, whose love of fame and money was matched by his determination to campaign against Italian-American harassment in the United States.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: The Last Don
programme.desc: Joe Massino, the 'Last Don', crushes anyone who goes against the mafia code of omerta. Loyalty to his family, and obedience to their code of silence, is everything. But when the Feds take Massino down, Massino takes everyone down with him.

programme.title: Mafia vs. JFK
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroys his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Armored Personnel Carriers
programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.title: Somali Pirate Takedown: The Real Story
programme.desc: Find out the real story behind the Navy SEAL kill shots that finally freed Captain Richard Phillips.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Peeling Layers Off a Covered Log Home in Virginia
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Abingdon, Virginia, to take down a farmhouse that Mark bought sight unseen. The house is really a 200 year-old log cabin covered by layers of siding and overgrowth. As they strip away each layer, the news gets better.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Turning a Ramshackle Cabin Into a Guest House In Missouri
programme.desc: The guys take down and rebuild a historic 170-year-old cabin. Sherman leads the guys in converting this cabin into a guest house for kindred spirit client, Mark Perry.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Raising a Massive Timber Frame Barn in Downtown Lewisburg
programme.desc: Mark and the guys work in downtown Lewisburg, West Virginia, to raise a massive timber frame as the new shelter for the Lewisburg farmer's market. The 200-year-old logs prove to be a challenge when the builders begin to raise the bents.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building a Log Chapel With a Stained Glass Window
programme.desc: Mark and the guys head to Johnny Jett's hometown in Kentucky to build a log chapel. First, they reclaim a stained glass window from a deteriorating 100-year-old church. Then they build the chapel and install the window.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Saving Every Board From a Kincheloe Cattle Barn
programme.desc: Mark and the guys travel to Jane Lew, West Virginia, to salvage the wood from a 120-year-old cattle barn that is slated for demolition. The rare, wide plank boards end up in living rooms, man-caves, and outdoor projects all over Jane Lew.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.desc: Chef/Scientist Alton Brown examines spinach salad recipes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Panama City

programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern dives in to the Mediterranean and seafood-heavy cuisine of Baja California, Mexico. From simple smoked tuna to crispy fish tacos, Caesar salad to zesty seafood cocktail hangover cures, Baja's cuisine is an international sensation.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Amman
programme.desc: Andrew introduces the rich and welcoming dishes of Amman, Jordan. The city's multicultural influences have created a culinary scene steeped in hospitality. Andrew samples some of the more well-known dishes such as towers of goat and veggies and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake Freedom
programme.desc: For her client's cake, detail master Suzanne creates a pair of legs that are made for walking. Molly has only one day to create four realistic and playful kitty cakes.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake Pride
programme.desc: Fondant details make Suzanne's cake a true work of art, and Nastassja puts her own spin on a childhood friend's christening cake. Eloise creates a colorful cake with a surprise filling for a Pride festival, and Molly makes a little boy's birthday roar.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Luxurious and Playful Cakes
programme.desc: Luxurious details and elegant decor make for a most-extravagant wedding cake. Then zoo animals come to life, sugar looks like hand-blown glass, and a duck rides a mechanical bull on a super playful birthday cake.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Dinosaurs and Golden Gate Cakes
programme.desc: A baker brings the Diabloceratops back from extinction, and wedding dreams come true with a miniature bride and groom look-alike topper. Then, the San Francisco skyline is recreated in crazy detail.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Tony Hawk
programme.desc: Four cupcake bakers try to skate their way into an exclusive party for Tony Hawk's Stand Up for Skate Parks event in Las Vegas.

programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Four Monsters and a Funeral/ Rainbow Doom
programme.desc: Mavis has to hold a mock funeral after fibbing to Death and saying her Uncle Gene is dead. Mavis beats the video game, Rainbow Doom, using a cursed code, but the curse brings the game to life.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: The Northern Frights/ Don't Fear the Realtor
programme.desc: Uncle Gene's been invited to a performance of the Northern Frights! Maggie the ghostwriter is back and wants to sell Hotel Transylvania.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Wand Ambition/ Lost in Transylvation
programme.desc: Mavis' lost magic wand falls into the wrong hands and Hotel Transylvania gets trapped inside a snow globe. Mavis finally gets a word in the Vamptionary!

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: The Series: Holy Babies/ Aunt Lydia's New Clothes
programme.desc: Mavis fibs that it is her birthday to get an ice scream bar. After 500 years, Aunt Lydia's invisibility poncho arrives.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Raging Dragon! Brutal Luinor!
programme.desc: Aiger may have won the Lúinor Cup, but he's got some training to do before he can fight Lui. First, he must deal with a strange fortune teller.

programme.title: Yo-Kai Watch: Country Folk'll Try Anything: The Pottery Studio
programme.desc: A boy named Nate find a capsule which give him a Yo-Kai watch for identifying Yo-Kai.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The Wisdom Not To Run!
DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Hiro The Villain
programme.desc: Momakase blackmails Hiro into helping her steal her family's knives from Yama's safe.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium/ Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons

programme.title: Amphibia: Lily Pad Thai/ Plantar's Last Stand

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!

programme.desc: Learn how a soccer ball from astronaut Ellison Onizuka’s daughter’s teammates at a high school in Clear Lake, Texas, survived the tragic Challenger space shuttle explosion in January 1986 and finally completed its mission to space 31 years later.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Declan's Legacy
programme.desc: Notre Dame student Declan Sullivan was killed in a fall in 2010 while filming football practice. For the first time on television, Declan's family shares their story of that time and how Declan's legacy lives on through nearly 100 Chicago children.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Fight On: The Jake Olson Story
programme.desc: A look at the incredible story of USC long-snapper Jake Olson who made history as the first blind athlete to play in a Division I college football game.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Paradise: From the Ashes
programme.desc: The emotional journey of the Paradise High School football team, one year removed from the wildfires that scorched their town and claimed 86 lives. E:60 follows the Paradise Bobcats on their path to rebuild.

programme.title: Movie: Shazam!
programme.desc: A boy has the power to turn into a grown-up superhero.

programme.title: Movie: The Day After Tomorrow
programme.desc: As the biggest, most intense winter storm in modern history barrels down on New York City, a climatologist who has tried to warn the world of the potential for such a storm must save his son and his son's girlfriend, who are trapped in the ensuing chaos.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.title: Westworld: The Original
programme.desc: As another day of fantasy plays out in Westworld, top programmer Bernard Lowe alerts park founder Dr. Robert Ford about incidents of aberrant behaviour cropping up in some recently re-coded hosts.

programme.title: Westworld: Chestnut
programme.desc: A pair of guests, arrive at Westworld with different expectations and agendas. Meanwhile, a behavior engineer tweaks the emotions of a madam in Sweetwater's brothel, in order to avoid a recall.

programme.title: Movie: John Wick: Chapter 3 - Parabellum
programme.desc: Former hitman John Wick, pursued by assassins after being excommunicated by the murder-for-hire underworld, attempts to have the bounty on his head removed.

programme.title: Movie: Alfie
programme.desc: A womanizing British limo driver in Manhattan learns that his devil-may-care attitude has become a poor substitute for true love and lasting friendship.

programme.title: Movie: Big Trouble in Little China
programme.desc: A trucker helps his friend rescue his fiancée from an ancient Chinese sorcerer, who must wed her to be freed from his prison.

programme.title: One Survivor Remembers
programme.desc: A woman recalls how she survived various camps at the hands of the Nazis.

programme.title: Movie: Elektra
programme.desc: An assassin ends up protecting the father and daughter she was commissioned to kill.

programme.title: Movie: King Arthur
programme.desc: A demystified version of the legend of King Arthur and the Knights of the Round Table.

programme.title: Movie: Breakthrough
programme.desc: After falling through the ice on a frozen lake, a boy is without a pulse for nearly 45 minutes, but with the help of doctors he makes a miraculous recovery that strengthens his and his family's faith.

programme.title: Movie: Truth or Dare
programme.desc: A harmless game of truth or dare between young friends takes a deadly turn when something starts killing those who refuse to answer truthfully or to follow through on a dare. One of its players tries to figure out how to end the game before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: Nine months into Pius XXIII's tenure, Voiello discusses the distressing state of the church's finances and attributes the decline to Lenny's unpopular decisions. In Honduras, Cardinal Dussolier makes love to a young man a woman.

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: Blaming Lenny for a young man's suicide, Voiello shows Caltanissetta the flash drive of the incriminating photos. Don Tommaso confides in Sister Mary the Pope is going through a profound crisis of faith.

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: Safe from prying eyes, Lenny prays for Dussolier while underwater in a pool. Cardinal Marivaux tells Lenny about the Blessed Juana, a young girl who died of leukemia in 1980. Sister Mary tells Lenny that his decision on abortion is unleashing protests.

programme.title: The Young Pope
programme.desc: In response to Lenny's stance on abortion, Spencer tells the Pope he created an 'overly rigid' system and urges him to rethink it. Tabloid stories accusing Archbishop Kurtwell of pedophilia are tacked up on the walls of his disheveled hotel room.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Ebbtide's Revenge
programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Miles to Go

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser

programme.title: Frasier: The Matchmaker
programme.desc: Frasier sets up a date for Daphne with Tom, the new station manager. But Tom, who is gay, mistakenly believes that he has a date with Frasier.

programme.title: Frasier: Flour Child

programme.title: Frasier: Duke's, We Hardly Knew Ye

programme.title: Frasier: The Botched Language of Cranes

programme.title: Frasier: The Candidate

programme.title: Frasier: Burying a Grudge

programme.desc: Actors Italia Ricci and Jack Turner from the Hallmark Channel original movie 'Love in Winterland' stop by. Then, actress Lisa Whelchel visits.

programme.title: Movie: Lucky in Love
programme.desc: After a few innocent April Fool's jokes, a woman's dream life starts to become reality.

programme.title: Movie: The Hangover
programme.desc: Two days before his wedding, three friends decide to take a groom to Las Vegas. Since the bride-to-be doesn't approve of bachelor parties, the men lie to her about their trip. After a wild night of partying, the guys wake up to find the groom missing.

programme.title: Movie: The Internship
programme.desc: Two salesmen manage to land internships with Google after their careers are destroyed by the digital world. Once inside, they face full on competitions, battling the world's top tech-savvy geniuses in an attempt to reinvent themselves and their careers.

programme.desc: A woman and her young daughter bob up, tied together from the bottom of the harbour. The team has to reverse their usual methods of solving crimes and work their way backwards in this strange mystery.

programme.title: The Closer: Heroic Measures
programme.desc: A woman's son dies during surgery and Deputy Police Chief Brenda Johnson is called in.

programme.title: The Closer: The Other Woman
programme.desc: Brenda is called to testify in a case of Pope vs. Pope, a custody hearing between her boss and his ex wife. Brenda's team investigates a death of a woman whose identity may have been stolen by an addict.

programme.title: The Closer: Borderline
programme.desc: Leaving the scene of an accident to get to a multiple homicide scene, Brenda finds herself unable to drive the streets of L.A. Once she gets to the crime scene, she and the PHD are faced with another challenge.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Shake Your Groove Thing
programme.desc: Meredith thinks she made a mistake in surgery; Alex has a patient addicted to painkillers.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: If Tomorrow Never Comes
programme.desc: Derek chooses Meredith to assist with a surgery, but Bailey disapproves of their relationship.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Self-Destruct Button
programme.desc: Derek and Meredith spend a night together; George thinks an anaesthesiologist is drinking.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Save Me
programme.desc: Alex treats Devo, a patient whose religious beliefs jeopardize her chances for recovery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: Prosecutors turned to a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist to solve a missing person's case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Beaten by a Hair
programme.desc: Laura Houghteling left her Bethesda home and walked to the station to take a train to work. A peculiar strand of hair found in Laura's hairbrush enabled investigators to unravel the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: An exotic dancer who listens to voices in her head is a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hand Delivered
programme.desc: An anonymous 'tip' referring to unpublicized aspects of an unsolved case, leads police on a hunt for a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Murdered Boss
programme.desc: Celebrity real estate broker Linda Stein served New York's elite, but when she's found dead in her apartment, investigators are faced with a slew of powerful potential suspects.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Coworkers: Deadly Ambition
programme.desc: A shooting at the University of Alabama Huntsville leaves three professors dead and the community questioning how they missed a murderer in their midst.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Haunting Vision
programme.desc: A woman who survived a deadly childhood fire sends police a letter charging that her father killed her mother 30 years ago.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Waste Mis-Management
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman vanishes from her apartment complex. When the police find few leads at the scene of the crime, they realize a nearby dumpster may hold the key to all the answers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Little Seacret
programme.desc: A couple spent Memorial Day weekend at the beach, and then they simply vanished. A week later, police would get an unexpected lead from a robbery in progress, and the evidence they found helped solve a crime of unparalleled violence and brutality.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Lights Out
programme.desc: 'The Kathy Odom Case - cold-case detectives in Harris County, TX are stumped by the murder of a young housewife. For over a decade, leads were exhausted and suspects ruled out. But a new lead has changed everything, thanks to forensic science.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pet Rock
programme.desc: 'The Denise O'Neill Case' - a quiet waitress vanishes without a trace. Police suspect a case of a date gone horribly wrong. However, when her body is discovered, it comes wrapped in a mountain of evidence.

programme.title: George Lopez: Carmen's Dating

programme.title: George Lopez: Split Decision

programme.title: Full House: Road to Tokyo

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Puppification
programme.desc: Michael blends juices with a sticker at an appliance store, and then reverses the food chain ay a pet shop. Later, at a doggy spa, a rejuvenation machine turns back time.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Fishguise
programme.desc: Find out which trick was inspired by Michael's acting days, and which trick was modified because it was too messy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Positive Presence
programme.desc: Learn which trick Michael has been performing since he was a child, who embarked on a 21-day juice diet cleanse and what moment had everyone on set erupting with laughter.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Might Be Trippin'
programme.desc: Find out which trick nearly wounded a delivery man, what illusion is difficult for even skilled magicians to pull off and why fans speculated the show was connected to the illuminati.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Elevated Ferret Alert
programme.desc: Find out which trick made it hard for Michael to walk the next day, what trick was added at the last minute after a prop broke and what animal Michael fosters during shoots.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: An Over-Grooming Situation
programme.desc: Find out which trick left a producer with a wasp sting, and why several crew members left with headaches. Plus, find out why Michael wore a vest two sizes too small.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: The Doughy Parts
programme.desc: Find out which trick was a nightmare for the crew to clean up. Plus, find out which trick Michael had to rehearse for weeks, and why he was really nervous on set.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Turn to Gold
programme.desc: Find out what trick Michael loves to perform at parties and which trick was inspired by his fascination with superhero movies. Plus, learn the name of his favorite wig.

programme.title: Sex and the City: No Ifs, Ands or Butts
programme.desc: Carrie faces a tough decision when she meets Aidan, who makes it clear that he can't be with a smoker. Charlotte is horrified by her boyfriend's kissing skills. Steve and Miranda fight over practising for a million-dollar basketball shot.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Are We Sluts?
programme.desc: Carrie wonders why her guy won't hit the sheets; Miranda discovers she has an STD.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Drama Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is nervous about meeting Aidan's family; Charlotte meets a doctor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Big Time
programme.desc: Carrie bumps into Big at a party; Samantha fears menopause; Miranda breaks up with Steve.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Easy Come, Easy Go
programme.desc: Charlotte prompts Trey to propose; Big encounters Carrie and Aidan at a furniture show.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All or Nothing
programme.desc: Carrie's fling weighs on her conscience; Charlotte plays hardball over a pre-nup.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Running With Scissors
programme.desc: Carrie seeks advice about Big; Samantha's new guy wants her to be tested for AIDS.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Don't Ask, Don't Tell
programme.desc: On the eve of her wedding, Charlotte admits that she and Trey have not slept together.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Escape From New York
programme.desc: While visiting L.A., Samantha meets a model and Carrie meets Matthew McConaughey.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and Another City
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles, the girls head to the Playboy Mansion for a pool party.

programme.title: E! News
programme.desc: The biggest and most talked about stories of the day in pop culture.

programme.title: Botched: Most Outrageous Celebrity Patients
programme.desc: A countdown of the top 10 most outrageous celebrities.

programme.title: Botched: Boob-Watch
programme.desc: Former 'Baywatch' star Nicole Eggert wants smaller breasts after her last surgeon gave her implants that were too big. Terry tries to reconstruct a woman with flesh eating disease.

programme.title: Botched: Mo' Steroids Mo' Problems
programme.desc: Terry helps Mo Thugs rapper Guillermo 'Big Caz' Eiland and his case of 'Man Boobs,' former Model Jana Stoner who got breast implants in her butt after a Mexico surgery gone bad and a UK man with super-sized lips sees the doctors about his leaking filler.

programme.title: Botched: The Pec Whisperer
programme.desc: 'The Human Doll,' Justin Jedlica, returns to help Dr. Dubrow pump up a 'pec-less' body builder. Also, a former Miss India hopes Dr. Nassif can perfect her pig nose and the Doctors have a heart-to-heart with a woman obsessed with body modification.

programme.title: Pop of the Morning
programme.desc: Dr. Oz joins us live in studio. Plus, we're talking Oscar nominations.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Rob Lowe joins us live in studio. Plus, film expert Nikki Novak helps us break down the Oscar nominations.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New Boobs
programme.desc: Tiffany 'New York' Pollard is back to beat Breast Implant Illness (BII) and go au naturel, while another former patient with over injected lips returns hoping to restore them to normal and a cosplayer needs the Wizard of Boobs to save the day.

programme.title: Botched: Not OK From the UK
programme.desc: A UK patient with a duck butt and bulging belly forces Dr. Dubrow to perform a two-stage revision to restore her 24-year-old body. Meanwhile, another Brit needs Dr. Nassif's help to complete his K-Pop transformation.

programme.title: Botched: Bums, Boobs, and Baklava
programme.desc: A British bum ambassador is packing on the pounds to get a Kim K inspired butt while Dr. Dubrow helps a mother of nine battle one of the worst cases of capsular contracture he's ever seen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Small Town Sensations
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's parkin' at joints that are serving up big flavor in small towns. From old-school to new twists, these places have put themselves on the map with their killer grub.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Knockout Burger Joints
programme.desc: Guy's hitting up classic, real-deal burger joints. From California to New Jersey, Minnesota to Oklahoma, it's all about the all-American favorite.

programme.title: Challenge: The Wizard of Oz Cakes
programme.desc: Ian Ziering welcomes four cake artists to the kitchen as "Challenge" celebrates the 80th anniversary of "The Wizard of Oz." Winning this competition takes courage, brains and a lot of heart, and although four start the journey, only three will continue.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Orange You Glad You're in Flavortown
programme.desc: Chefs begin by making their best comfort dishes with only five ingredients or less. Next, there's a red light special on orange juice that the chefs must incorporate into their cocktail brunch dishes!

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives Tournament: GGG Super Teams Part 2
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's two worlds continue to collide as six more chefs from Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives and Guy's Grocery Games chefs pair up to create talented Super Teams. Guy brings back his DDD Dish Wheel and GGG Game Wheel, plus a never-before-seen 'Wheel-y'.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Indulge Me
programme.desc: The recruits enter boot camp and find out that the theme is indulgence. Their first lesson is that salads can be indulgent, too, and the recruits play a game where salad elements are tossed into a bowl on their teammate's head.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: That's Amore
programme.desc: Food Network Star winner Christian Petroni teams up with chef Carla Hall and brings two dynamic chefs who have mastered the food of his motherland, Italy.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Give Me Some Mo!
programme.desc: The kitchen is mo' fun when Sunny Anderson and Beach Bites' Katie Lee decide who will take on Bobby Flay. Puerto Rican chef Andre Gomez and Dominican chef Ramon Perez duke it out in the kitchen for their shot at the master.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Bye Bye Birdie
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Jet Tila work hard to outsmart their good friend Bobby Flay. They bring in one of his protégés, Chef Rebecca Weitzman, and fine dining's finest, Chef Brian Lewis, to muscle Bobby out of his kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Grind it Out!
programme.desc: Los Angeles chef Michael Voltaggio and skateboarding legend Tony Hawk know they can't skate through this competition. They bring in Sichuan master Pablo Zitzmann and young gun Ming Pu to attempt to kick-flip Bobby Flay out of his arena.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Snowed In

programme.title: The Kitchen: No Carb Left Behind
programme.desc: The Kitchen is having a celebration fully loaded with everyone's favorite carbs. Sunny Anderson kicks it off with an easy sausage and mushroom rigatoni pie, and Katie Lee takes on a bread basic, sundried tomato and rosemary focaccia.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Lovin' in the Oven
programme.desc: The Kitchen is warming up for the winter with dishes from the oven that are braised, broiled, roasted, toasted and baked. Geoffrey Zakarian makes his beer braised pork pot roast with winter vegetables, and Jeff Mauro shares his roasted gnocchi and veggie.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 2

programme.title: Football Is Us: The College Player

programme.title: Movie: Nightclub Secrets
programme.desc: A woman poses as a bottle girl at a nightclub to catch her sister's murderer.

programme.title: Movie: The Girl Next Door

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: The Hell Hound

programme.title: These Woods are Haunted: Haunted Cabin

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Bigfoot Moon Rising
programme.desc: After Russell records thermal imagery he's convinced is Bigfoot, Bryce hurries to have the footage analyzed by experts. The evidence is staggering. Mireya and Ronny have a terrifying experience when they realize they're not along in the forest.
