programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Gateway To Hell
programme.desc: A fire-breathing crater burns in the middle of a desert, and some suspect it's a gateway to hell. A deadly shark is found lurking in a golf course water hazard, and experts are baffled how it got there. A giant white blob threatens a town in California.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Nightmares of Neutron Stars
programme.desc: Neutron stars are strange and violent phenomena which defy the laws of physics, and new discoveries show that these bizarre nightmares are potentially far deadlier than we ever thought, with the power to destroy planets and even other stars.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Edge of the Solar System
programme.desc: Giant magnetic bubbles millions of miles wide, bizarre invisible matter, and a death star tearing through bands of icy comets, flinging them into violent orbits. All this and more could be inside our cosmic backyard, and effecting our lives on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The First Oceans
programme.desc: A discovery suggests the true origins of Earth's oceans are far more exotic than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Volcanoes
programme.desc: From our nearest planetary neighbour to tiny moons billions of miles away, today we are discovering volcanoes on alien worlds.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Life and Death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: Life once existed on Mars, but a series of devastating mass extinctions have made present-day life nearly impossible. The latest science shows how Martian life keeps bouncing back as it transforms from a blue watery world like Earth into a desert planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Earth: Venus's Evil Twin
programme.desc: There is a hellish planet in our solar system, covered in thick dense clouds and roasted by colossal temperatures. Incredibly this is a vision of Earth's future. To understand how our world will be destroyed we need to look at Earth's evil twin Venus.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn's secrets are out. The ferocious weather, the evolving ring system and the discovery of active geology on Saturn's moons has rewritten the textbooks. Scientists are looking for life on Saturn's moons and they may have found it on Titan.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Couple on the Run
programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Scarred for Life
programme.desc: Detectives hunt down a dangerous woman on the run after she slashed a former friend in the face with a box cutter.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Chasing a Ghost
programme.desc: Investigators search for a murder suspect in the towns and mountainsides of Puerto Rico, which proves to be a nightmare.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Gun Store Heist
programme.desc: In Virginia Beach, Virginia, almost 30 handguns were stolen after thieves broke through the roof of a gun store. Detectives try to secure the firearms before the thieves have time to sell the guns on the streets.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Was Gonna Go Home
programme.desc: The team tracks a stolen vehicle, blocks it in, and captures a gang member.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's the Brick Bandit!
programme.desc: The Task Force chases the 'Brick bandit' who leaves bricks in the car he steals. An officer has to take down a suspect by himself during a tense night.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Devil on One Shoulder
programme.desc: The task force finds the streets of Newark busier than ever during a rainstorm. An unexpected surprise forces the unit into pursuit. A crazy driver puts the unit's wet-weather skills to the test.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Saturday Night
programme.desc: A deliveryman has his car stolen at gunpoint, and the unit uses a decoy vehicle to try to catch the suspects. The Unit changes their schedule to catch the thieves off guard.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Houdini
programme.desc: Newark police catch a suspect red-handed, but back at the precinct, the suspect escapes from the interrogation room. After 'Houdini' eludes several attempts to capture him over the next two months, the Fugitive Task Force takes over.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Moving Target
programme.desc: Deputy Mendez and the Fugitive Task Force search for a career criminal before another victim is robbed, assaulted, or worse.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Just One Step Behind
programme.desc: Detectives scour the streets to find people who are willing to provide information on a fugitive's whereabouts.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Perfect Storm
programme.desc: Detectives track a fugitive wanted for the second-degree rape of a young woman barely out of high school.

programme.desc: Yonkers first responders face unexpected challenges when they respond to a call for a man with a broken ankle who fell from a fire escape. In Tucson, Steven and Sam are called to a structure fire and must search inside for possible victims.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Re-Entry
programme.desc: Phase two of Sheriff Jamey Noel's unprecedented program begins with four new participants entering the Clark County Jail to continue the covert operation designed to root out corruption and contraband.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: As three new participants enter the program, the others fight for acceptance in the pods. One participant is forced into a confrontation that quickly turns physical.

programme.title: 60 Days In: All Pain, No Gain
programme.desc: The last participant enters the Clark County Jail and all eight must now face their new reality of life behind bars.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Hazed and Confused
programme.desc: Hazing, drug use and violence envelop Clark County Jail as two participants are on the brink of dropping out of the program.

programme.title: 60 Days In: Pod Wars
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose in the Clark County Jail when two pod bosses threaten the safety of three of our participants.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: A Man and His Gun
programme.desc: Michelle has ended her relationship with alcoholic Richard and is looking forward to getting on with her life. But Richard can't let go and as his obsession grows deeper it's clear their lives will be ripped apart by the violent consequences.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker
programme.desc: When Idaho hairdresser Makaela Zabel-Gravatt begins cutting the hair of truck driver Christopher Wirfs, little does she realize that it signals the start of a two-year long nightmare that will end in the most heart-stopping and disturbing way.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: High School Reunion
programme.desc: When single mother of two Latasha Edwards bumps into her old schoolmate Dammon, she thinks she's met her soul mate. But his charm hides a possessive, violent man. After they separate, Dammon's obsession deepens and Latasha fights to protect her family.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Good Neighbor
programme.desc: Excited about a fresh start, young single mom Savannah and her son move to a new neighbourhood. When her seemingly friendly next-door neighbor offers her help, she has no idea that a dangerous obsession will grow on the other side of her wall.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Following her divorce, Cristi buys a new home that needs work. Hoping handyman Curtis can fix it up, she ends up getting more than she bargained for. Curtis becomes fixated with Cristi and will stop at nothing until she becomes his.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath
programme.desc: On the day Robert Foust contemplated killing his own son, Aaron, he saw it as the only way to prevent Aaron from becoming a murderer. But instead, Robert chose to put himself and his son in God's hands. And God's plan would make him question everything.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: One of Their Own
programme.desc: When the daughter of an FBI agent disappears from an airport parking lot, law enforcement from all over the country rallies to find one of their own. But the case quickly becomes one of the bureau's most difficult and heartbreaking investigations.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Raised a Sociopath

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: The Salon Stalker

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Roadkill
programme.desc: A single mother and her daughter are delighted when a single dad and his two daughters move in next door. They become fast friends until molestation charges send their relationship spiralling into anger, accusation, and eventually multiple bloody deaths.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighbors on a Dead End
programme.desc: A disabled fireman appoints himself sheriff of his street, policing his neighbors and clamping down on violations ranging from loud music to off leash dogs. Things boil over at a birthday party where shots are fired and blood runs in the street.

programme.title: Dateline: Indiscretion
programme.desc: A young woman is found brutally murdered in her Baltimore home. Police find themselves stumped for over a decade, until a DNA breakthrough leads to a surprising suspect.

programme.title: Dateline: After Midnight
programme.desc: A mother’s intuition leads campus cops in Western New York to a terrible discovery in a dorm room.

programme.title: Dateline: Lost in Sin City
programme.desc: A small town girl moved to the big city of Las Vegas, where she found a new career and a new love. But then she vanished. Within days, police found her body. But finding who killed her would be a tougher mystery to crack.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: A Place She'd Call Home
programme.desc: Police are baffled when Melissa White is found murdered in the backyard of her Viola, Illinois home. But when investigators take a closer look at Melissa's neighbors, they unearth a secret. Could this be the key to apprehending Melissa's murderer?

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Cost of Competition
programme.desc: When the home of the Resaca, Georgia 'Carpet King' is showered with gunfire and kills beloved daughter Tara Swilley, the self-made millionaire is convinced one of his business partners must be behind the killing.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Friendly Foes
programme.desc: The double homicide of a young mother and her 21-month-old daughter sends Galax's tiny police force on a frenzied mission to stop unspeakable evil in its tracks.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Something's Not Right
programme.desc: When a popular cheerleader goes missing in rural Arkansas, the small town is sent into a panic. After her sports car is found abandoned, investigators are sure something is not right, but no one expects the horror that ensues.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Midway: Taking Back the Pacific
programme.desc: June 1942, six months after Pearl Harbour, the battle of Midway will change the course of history and the Pacific war. The Americans take on the most powerful navy in the world, and win.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Flood Suckers
programme.desc: After a historic downpour in the City of Toronto, Gina’s basement floods with water from the city’s sewage system. Mike does double-duty as he tries to save this family’s home as well as the memories stored in an old workshop in the basement.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Rocky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: With the help of a small crew, Cal and Billy Joe battle the elements as they race to finish Cal's cabin in time for hunting season. However, an unexpected setback threatens to halt the project entirely.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Snowball Effect
programme.desc: At Jackie's slippery build site, the team works to finish the subfloor and start raising walls, but rain and mud hinder them at every step. Meanwhile, the Hills are forced to dig their supplies out of three feet of snow.

programme.title: I Hate My Kitchen: A Reclaimed Kitchen With Historic Tile And Eco-Friendly Bamboo
programme.desc: Jevetta and Amondo have three children and large extended families and the party is always at their large 1950s multi-level home. Both love to cook and share their home with friends and family, but the cut off kitchen space doesn't make things much fun.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Philly Street Flippin'
programme.desc: Licensed contractor, real estate expert and designer Rachel Street flips an historic row home in her hometown of Philadelphia, PA. She transforms the first floor into an open-concept space and exposes the brick along one side of the home.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Huge
programme.desc: Rachel renovates a grand row home in the up-and-coming neighborhood of East Passyunk. Immediately, she faces structural problems in the century-old property and has to rebuild the entire exterior wall. She also revives the ornate turrets.

programme.title: Philly Revival: A Troubled Twin
programme.desc: Rachel tackles a twin row home in Germantown that was partially rehabbed by a previous owner. She quickly discovers the previous work is less than perfect and is forced to rebuild the rotting roof, install new brick on the exterior and add new insulation.

programme.title: Philly Revival: An Urban Retreat
programme.desc: Rachel Street renovates a huge, turn-of-the-century home in the Mt. Airy district. She decides to restore several of the property's original features, including a walled-up sun porch, elaborate fireplaces and cabinetry.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Rachel takes on a row home that is double the width of a regular row house in the popular Dickinson Narrows neighbourhood. The renovation goes from a cosmetic rehab to a full gut job as she discovers serious plumbing issues.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Anything But Basic
programme.desc: Rachael takes on a builder-basic row home in Philadelphia's East Passyunk neighborhood and intends to flip it fast. Her plan for converting this home into a designer-chic abode includes rebuilding the kitchen peninsula and creating entertaining space.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: First Floor Troubles
programme.desc: Dale Earnhardt Jr. and his wife Amy compete with Mother Nature and face limitations while renovating an historic home. Their goal is to create a guest bedroom, bathroom and laundry room on the first floor, but they discover unexpected damage.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: Rookie Ralph Meets Shiplap
programme.desc: Amy plans to create an open flow between the kitchen, living and dining spaces, but rotted wood and extensive termite damage present a serious challenge. Dale and Amy manage to transform the small, boxy rooms into airing and comfortable spaces.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: Always Read the Instructions
programme.desc: The Earnhardts tackle the second floor and reconfigure the entire layout while dealing with dead rodents, cat poo and Dale Jr.'s enthusiasm for diving into projects without completely knowing what to do.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Dale Jr. and Amy: Backyard Oasis
programme.desc: Dale and Amy set out to transform their backyard jungle into a perfect space to entertain. They create the tile backsplash and a sink out of reclaimed materials and find a clever way to use a surfboard as a shower.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: In a Maine Cabin Masters first, Chase and his creative crew help a newlywed couple take a questionable 'wedding gift' and turn it into an alpine ski bungalow that would rival those found in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cowboy Cupcakes
programme.desc: Four bakers try to hang on as they fight for a place at the star-studded party for the Professional Bull Rider's Award Ceremony on the Las Vegas strip.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dates on a Plane
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the California desert for a date with deliciousness at the Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival. He tries spicy treats like the fire fingers kartwheel and the sonoran fire dog.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem For An Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deep-Fried Inferno
programme.desc: Where there's smoke, there's fire, and Noah Cappe is ready to have his taste buds fired up at the Spencerport Volunteer Firemen's Association Carnival in New York. From the Flaming Weck to the Five Alarm Fries, there's plenty of sizzle.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jerusalem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern investigates the rich culinary heritage of Jerusalem. From savory classics like shawarma, falafel, kubbeh and hummus to tempting pastries like halva and bureka, this holy city's edible icons are steeped in history.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Marseille
programme.desc: From beef stew to French pizza, Andrew Zimmern uncovers Marseille's edible icons.

programme.title: Food Paradise: The Last Food Frontier
programme.desc: Fantasies come true as the best views and food in Alaska are revealed. Diners forget the lower 48 as they feast under the Northern Lights on king crab legs, reindeer ragu, elk meatloaf and salmon burgers.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Slice of Heaven
programme.desc: Pizzerias share their most delicious spins on America's favorite pie, from a family-run institution in Chicago specializing in stuffed pizzas to a one-of-a-kind pizza palace slinging outrageous dessert pizzas.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: It's All Relative
programme.desc: Tia's aunt Blondie and cousin Jerome come over to share family stories while Tia and Cory cook up some impressive Caribbean-inspired dishes. Tia and Cory make a family secret curry chicken and potatoes as well as seafood paella.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Spicy L.A.
programme.desc: Tia and her husband hit the streets of LA for a spicy adventure. Tia makes two sets of tacos, vegetarian roasted butternut squash tacos with avocado hummus and blackened fish tacos with avocado slaw.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Game On
programme.desc: Tia invites her friends over for some alfresco finger foods! On the menu: Teriyaki Grilled Steak Skewers with Chili Herb Dipping Sauce, BLT Salad Bites, Hot Potato Tots with Chipotle Ketchup, and Tomato Pop Micheladas.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Dine and Dish
programme.desc: Cory offers to watch Cree for the night so Tia and her friend, Kelly Rowland, can enjoy a girls' night in. Kelly lends Tia a hand to prepare chicken katsu with spicy apple slaw; cauliflower fried rice, sesame noodles with veggies and spiked green tea.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Besties Brunch
programme.desc: Tia Mowry treats two of her best friends, Jessica Laskey and Traci Blackwell, to a delicious brunch. Over sips of Blackberry Brambles and great conversation, the girls enjoy Tia's Crab Cakes with Spicy Remoulade, Zucchini Ribbon Salad with Pesto.

programme.title: Tia Mowry at Home: Full House
programme.desc: Tia Mowry and her husband, Cory, have just moved into a new home and are eager to fill it with good friends and good food.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Flavors of New England
programme.desc: Bobby takes a culinary trip to New England for his latest brunch.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Best of the Pacific Northwest
programme.desc: A Pacific Northwest menu features smoked salmon and scallion scramble.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on Bourbon Street
programme.desc: Bobby Flay pays tribute to America's tastiest block with a brunch for Bourbon Street.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bold Southwestern Brunch
programme.desc: A Southwestern brunch includes Texas eggs benedict and cast iron home fries.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked Whole Hog
programme.desc: Michael Symon smokes a whole hog for a juicy pulled pork sandwich in Asheville, North Carolina.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot and Spicy
programme.desc: Michael Symon digs into a spicy burger that uses four different types of peppers to fire up even the most adventurous eaters in Hell's Kitchen, New York City, before heading to Nashville, where he finds Southern comforts infused with Latin flavors.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.
